title: The Galaxy Z Fold 8's Fresh Design Comes With Unexpected Trade-Offs
summary: The Galaxy Z Fold 8 is just 4.88 inches tall. At 0.18 inches, the Galaxy Z Fold 8 is slightly thicker than the Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra when opened.
